title: Beautysaid Stained Glass Window Film Frosted Glass Film Windows Privacy Film Opaque Rainbow Window Films Iridescent Self-adhesive Colourful Anti UV Frosted Window Film For Rental Bathroom 60 * 200cm
features: Stained Glass Window Film Privacy --【Window Film Sun Blocker】- Frosted Window film can block 96% of ultraviolet rays and 65% of heat energy. Heat Reflective window film effectively prevents furniture from fading.

Stained Glass Window Film Privacy --【 95% Privacy Protect】- The privacy film for glass windows can make the room become blurred, Preventing personal privacy leaks. But Window film allows soft light to come in and provides a private space to enjoy life. Privacy level: ★★★★☆.

Stained Glass Window Film Privacy --【Modern Triangle Geometry Design】- Window film is a unique triangular geometry design. Window films make our kitchen or any living space extremely ornamental, which creates a gentle look and high-end style, DIY design is more creative decoration according to the pattern of the triangle.

Rainbow Window Film Privacy --【Reusable & No Glue】- Frosted window film is a static cling design. Easy to install and remove, and no residue will leave on the windows. Also, If it hadn't been broken, you can use it again and again.

TIPS - All window films are only suitable for smooth glass surfaces, frosted glass, and cut glass are not workable; If our window films have any quality problems, please don’t hesitate to contact us through email.
description: Product Description Stain glass window film self adhesive makes your home colourful You don't have to worry about nosy neighbors and curious eyes, Because of its frosting, blurring design that blocks prying eyes Unique Rainbow Light Appears After the Light Passes Through No need to worry about leaving untreatable marks on your windows UV protection while giving you privacy.
